title: RDC Concrete Pte Ltd v Sato Kogyo (S) Pte Ltd
text: Proof-of-concept sandbox summary (paraphrased from public information; not authoritative text). The Singapore Court of Appeal clarified the law on discharge of a contract by breach, organising the circumstances in which an innocent party may elect to terminate into a structured framework of situations, including renunciation, breach of a condition, and breach depriving the innocent party of substantially the whole benefit of the contract. RDC Concrete is a leading Singapore authority on termination for breach.
